milestoneTitle: Phase M9.17c — Destructive-action color standard (design-amend chunk 1 of 2). Introduced --danger token family (solid, border, glow, surface, ink, hover) in :root derived via color-mix from a single hue source — same pattern as --base-shared → --accent-*. CLAUDE.md design-language section gains the 'one --danger for every destructive action' rule; the design-review skill's color hard-rule updated to flag hardcoded reds in *-delete / *-danger / *-wipe / *-remove-* selectors. Plan doc ledger gets a new M9.17 suite section covering everything from M9.17.0 onward. No surface migrations yet; .learn-action-btn-danger + .project-delete cascade in M9.17c.a. Out of scope: sentiment / status pills (red = severity, not action).
